raw_cost_notes_input: Ai2â€™s OLMo 3 announcement describes the OLMo 3 family and the later OLMo 3.1 continuation [web:159]. The Hugging Face model card for OLMo 3 32B states the OLMo 3 family includes 7B and 32B models and that code/checkpoints/training details are released [web:160]. Long-context (65,536 tokens) and architecture details (dense decoder-only transformer, GQA, hybrid attention, RoPE/YaRN scaling) are described for OLMo 3 32B Base [web:170].

The Hugging Face model card exists for OLMo 3 7B Instruct. Artificial Analysis lists OLMo 3 7B Instruct as a 7B-parameter, text-in/text-out model with ~66k context. The OLMo 3 7B Think model card explicitly states Apache 2.0 licensing for that OLMo 3 release.
